title: Arkansas moms struggle to remain in workforce, according to study detailed during Fayetteville library event
description: FAYETTEVILLE -- Most Arkansas moms want to work, but child care costs have become a barrier for them doing so, a Women's Foundation of Arkansas study found.

description: Louisiana-born stand-up comedian Theo Von will not ride as a special guest in the Wearin' of the Green St. Patrick's Day Parade in Baton Rouge on Saturday, but there are late additions to the lineup.

title: Portland will increase cruise ship tariffs in 2027
description: PORTLAND, ME – JULY 4: The cruise ship Zuiderdam is berthed at the Ocean Gateway terminal on Friday, July 4, 2025. The ship, a Holland America vessel, is 935 feet long, has 11 passenger decks and can hold 2,364 passengers. The ship’s name comes from the Dutch word for southern point on a compass. (Gregory Rec/fStaff Photographer)" data-image-caption="The cruise ship Zuiderdam is berthed at the Ocean Gateway terminal on July 4, 2025. The ship, a Holland America vessel, is 935 feet long, has 11 passenger decks and can hold 2,364 passengers. (Gregory Rec/Staff Photographer)" data-medium-file="https://www.pressherald.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2026/03/42513293_20250704_cruise-ship_4.jpg?w=300" data-large-file="https://www.pressherald.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2026/03/42513293_20250704_cruise-ship_4.jpg?w=780" />The new fee structure will provide an incentive for ships to use cleaner fuels while anchored in the city's harbor.
